001package guiAddRemoveRoles;
002
003import database.Database;
004import javafx.collections.FXCollections;
005import javafx.geometry.Pos;
006import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox;
007
008/*******
009 * <p> Title: ControllerAddRemoveRoles Class. </p>
010 * 
011 * <p> Description: The Java/FX-based Add Remove Roles Page.  This class provides the controller
012 * actions basic on the user's use of the JavaFX GUI widgets defined by the View class.
013 * 
014 * This page has one of the more complex Controller Classes due to the fact that the changing the
015 * values of widgets changes the layout of the page.  It is up to the Controller to determine what
016 * to do and it involves the proper elements from View Class for this GUI page.
017 * 
018 * The class has been written assuming that the View or the Model are the only class methods that
019 * can invoke these methods.  This is why each has been declared at "protected".  Do not change any
020 * of these methods to public.</p>
021 * 
022 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
023 * 
024 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
025 * 
026 * @version 1.00                2025-08-17 Initial version
027 * @version 1.01                2025-09-16 Update Javadoc documentation *  
028 */
029
030public class ControllerAddRemoveRoles {
031        
032        /*-********************************************************************************************
033
034        User Interface Actions for this page
035        
036        This controller is not a class that gets instantiated.  Rather, it is a collection of protected
037        static methods that can be called by the View (which is a singleton instantiated object) and 
038        the Model is often just a stub, or will be a singleton instantiated object.
039        
040         */
041
042        /**
043         * Default constructor is not used.
044         */
045        public ControllerAddRemoveRoles() {
046        }
047        
048        // Reference for the in-memory database so this package has access
049        private static Database theDatabase = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.database;         
050
051        /**********
052         * <p> Method: doSelectUser() </p>
053         * 
054         * <p> Description: This method uses the ComboBox widget, fetches which item in the ComboBox
055         * was selected (a user in this case), and establishes that user and the current user, setting
056         * easily accessible values without needing to do a query. </p>
057         * 
058         */
059        protected static void doSelectUser() {
060                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theSelectedUser = 
061                                (String) ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectUser.getValue();
062                theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(ViewAddRemoveRoles.theSelectedUser);
063                setupSelectedUser();
064        }
065        
066        
067        /**********
068         * <p> Method: repaintTheWindow() </p>
069         * 
070         * <p> Description: This method determines the current state of the window and then establishes
071         * the appropriate list of widgets in the Pane to show the proper set of current values. </p>
072         * 
073         */
074        protected static void repaintTheWindow() {
075                // Clear what had been displayed
076                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRootPane.getChildren().clear();
077                
078                // Defermine which of the two views to show to the user
079                if (ViewAddRemoveRoles.theSelectedUser.compareTo("<Select a User>") == 0) {
080                        // Only show the request to select a user to be updated and the ComboBox
081                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRootPane.getChildren().addAll(
082                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_PageTitle, ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_UserDetails, 
083                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_UpdateThisUser, ViewAddRemoveRoles.line_Separator1,
084                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_SelectUser, ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectUser, 
085                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.line_Separator4, ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_Return,
086                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_Logout, ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_Quit);
087                }
088                else {
089                        // Show all the fields as there is a selected user (as opposed to the prompt)
090                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRootPane.getChildren().addAll(
091                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_PageTitle, ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_UserDetails,
092                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_UpdateThisUser, ViewAddRemoveRoles.line_Separator1,
093                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_SelectUser,
094                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectUser, 
095                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_CurrentRoles,
096                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_SelectRoleToBeAdded,
097                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd,
098                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_AddRole,
099                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_SelectRoleToBeRemoved,
100                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove,
101                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_RemoveRole,
102                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.line_Separator4, 
103                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_Return,
104                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_Logout,
105                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_Quit);
106                }
107                
108                // Add the list of widgets to the stage and show it
109                
110                // Set the title for the window
111                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theStage.setTitle("CSE 360 Foundation Code: Admin Opertaions Page");
112                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theStage.setScene(ViewAddRemoveRoles.theAddRemoveRolesScene);
113                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theStage.show();
114        }
115        
116        
117        /**********
118         * <p> Method: setupSelectedUser() </p>
119         * 
120         * <p> Description: This method fetches the current values for the widgets whose values change
121         * based on which user has been selected and any actions that the admin takes. </p>
122         * 
123         */
124        private static void setupSelectedUser() {
125                System.out.println("*** Entering setupSelectedUser");
126                
127                // Create the list of roles that could be added for the currently selected user (e.g., Do
128                // not show a role to add that the user already has!)
129                ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList.clear();
130                ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList.add("<Select a role>");
131                if (!theDatabase.getCurrentAdminRole())
132                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList.add("Admin");
133                if (!theDatabase.getCurrentStudentRole())
134                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList.add("Student");
135                if (!theDatabase.getCurrentStaffRole())
136                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList.add("Staff");
137
138                // Create the list of roles that could be removed for the currently selected user (e.g., Do
139                // not show a role to remove that the user does not have!)
140                ViewAddRemoveRoles.removeList.clear();
141                ViewAddRemoveRoles.removeList.add("<Select a role>");
142                if (theDatabase.getCurrentAdminRole())
143                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.removeList.add("Admin");
144                if (theDatabase.getCurrentStudentRole())
145                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.removeList.add("Student");
146                if (theDatabase.getCurrentStaffRole())
147                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.removeList.add("Staff");
148                
149                // Create the list or roles that the user currently has with proper use of a comma between
150                // items
151                boolean notTheFirst = false;
152                String theCurrentRoles = "";
153                
154                // Admin role - It can only be at the head of a list
155                if (theDatabase.getCurrentAdminRole()) {
156                        theCurrentRoles += "Admin";
157                        notTheFirst = true;
158                }
159                
160                // Roles 1 - It could be at the head of the list or later in the list
161                if (theDatabase.getCurrentStudentRole()) {
162                        if (notTheFirst)
163                                theCurrentRoles += ", Role1"; 
164                        else {
165                                theCurrentRoles += "Student";
166                                notTheFirst = true;
167                        }
168                }
169
170                // Roles 2 - It could be at the head of the list or later in the list
171                if (theDatabase.getCurrentStaffRole()) {
172                        if (notTheFirst)
173                                theCurrentRoles += ", Role2"; 
174                        else {
175                                theCurrentRoles += "Staff";
176                                notTheFirst = true;
177                        }
178                }
179
180                // Given the above actions, populate the related widgets with the new values
181                ViewAddRemoveRoles.label_CurrentRoles.setText("This user's current roles: " + 
182                                theCurrentRoles);               
183                ViewAddRemoveRoles.setupComboBoxUI(ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd, "Dialog",
184                                16, 150, 280, 205);
185                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd.setItems(FXCollections.
186                                observableArrayList(ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList));
187                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd.getSelectionModel().clearAndSelect(0);              
188                ViewAddRemoveRoles.setupButtonUI(ViewAddRemoveRoles.button_AddRole, "Dialog", 16, 150, 
189                                Pos.CENTER, 460, 205);
190                ViewAddRemoveRoles.setupComboBoxUI(ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove, "Dialog",
191                                16, 150, 280, 275);
192                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove.setItems(FXCollections.
193                                observableArrayList(ViewAddRemoveRoles.removeList));
194                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove.getSelectionModel().select(0);
195
196                // Repaint the window showing this new values
197                repaintTheWindow();
198
199        }
200        
201        
202        /**********
203         * <p> Method: performAddRole() </p>
204         * 
205         * <p> Description: This method adds a new role to the list of role in the ComboBox select
206         * list. </p>
207         * 
208         */
209        protected static void performAddRole() {
210                
211                // Determine which item in the ComboBox list was selected
212                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theAddRole =
213                                (String) ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd.getValue();
214                
215                // If the selection is the list header (e.g., "<Select a role>") don't do anything
216                if (ViewAddRemoveRoles.theAddRole.compareTo("<Select a role>") != 0) {
217                        
218                        // If an actual role was selected, update the database entry for that user for the role
219                        if (theDatabase.updateUserRole(ViewAddRemoveRoles.theSelectedUser,
220                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.theAddRole, "true") ) {
221                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd = new ComboBox <String>();
222                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd.setItems(FXCollections.
223                                        observableArrayList(ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList));
224                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToAdd.getSelectionModel().clearAndSelect(0);              
225                                setupSelectedUser();
226                        }
227                }
228        }
229        
230        
231        /**********
232         * <p> Method: performRemoveRole() </p>
233         * 
234         * <p> Description: This method removes an existing role to the list of role in the ComboBox
235         * select list. </p>
236         * 
237         */
238        protected static void performRemoveRole() {
239                
240                // Determine which item in the ComboBox list was selected
241                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRemoveRole = (String) ViewAddRemoveRoles.
242                                combobox_SelectRoleToRemove.getValue();
243                
244                // If the selection is the list header (e.g., "<Select a role>") don't do anything
245                if (ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRemoveRole.compareTo("<Select a role>") != 0) {
246                        
247                        // Prevent removing own admin role
248                        if (ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRemoveRole.compareTo("Admin") == 0 &&
249                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.theSelectedUser.compareTo(
250                                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.theUser.getUserName()) == 0) {
251                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.alertRoleError.setContentText(
252                                                "You cannot remove your own Admin role.");
253                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.alertRoleError.showAndWait();
254                                return;
255                        }
256                        
257                        // Prevent removing the last admin role in the system
258                        if (ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRemoveRole.compareTo("Admin") == 0 &&
259                                        theDatabase.getNumberOfAdmins() <= 1) {
260                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.alertRoleError.setContentText(
261                                                "At least one Admin user must remain in the system.");
262                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.alertRoleError.showAndWait();
263                                return;
264                        }
265                        
266                        // If an actual role was selected, update the database entry for that user for the role
267                        if (theDatabase.updateUserRole(ViewAddRemoveRoles.theSelectedUser, 
268                                        ViewAddRemoveRoles.theRemoveRole, "false") ) {
269                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove = new ComboBox <String>();
270                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove.setItems(FXCollections.
271                                        observableArrayList(ViewAddRemoveRoles.addList));
272                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.combobox_SelectRoleToRemove.getSelectionModel().
273                                        clearAndSelect(0);              
274                                setupSelectedUser();
275                        }                               
276                }
277        }
278        
279        
280        /**********
281         * <p> Method: performReturn() </p>
282         * 
283         * <p> Description: This method returns the user (who must be an Admin as only admins are the
284         * only users who have access to this page) to the Admin Home page. </p>
285         * 
286         */
287        protected static void performReturn() {
288                guiAdminHome.ViewAdminHome.displayAdminHome(ViewAddRemoveRoles.theStage,
289                                ViewAddRemoveRoles.theUser);
290        }
291        
292        
293        /**********
294         * <p> Method: performLogout() </p>
295         * 
296         * <p> Description: This method logs out the current user and proceeds to the normal login
297         * page where existing users can log in or potential new users with a invitation code can
298         * start the process of setting up an account. </p>
299         * 
300         */
301        protected static void performLogout() {
302                guiUserLogin.ViewUserLogin.displayUserLogin(ViewAddRemoveRoles.theStage);
303        }
304        
305        
306        /**********
307         * <p> Method: performQuit() </p>
308         * 
309         * <p> Description: This method terminates the execution of the program.  It leaves the
310         * database in a state where the normal login page will be displayed when the application is
311         * restarted.</p>
312         * 
313         */
314        protected static void performQuit() {
315                System.exit(0);
316        }
317}
